mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SIGNTRANSACTION( USERID, USERNAME, REGDATE, JUMINNO, SYSIP, SYSNAME, GUBUNCODE, TXCODE, PAGELANG, REGSITE, ENCSIGN, DELFLAG, REGDAY ) VALUES ( #{USERID}, #{USERNAME}, #{REGDATE}, #{JUMINNO}, #{SYSIP}, #{SYSNAME}, #{GUBUNCODE}, #{TXCODE}, #{PAGELANG}, #{REGSITE},
#{ENCSIGN, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{DELFLAG}, #{REGDAY} )
mapper.select: SELECT USERID ,USERNAME ,REGDATE ,JUMINNO ,SYSIP ,SYSNAME ,GUBUNCODE ,TXCODE ,PAGELANG ,REGSITE ,ENCSIGN ,DELFLAG ,REGDAY FROM SIGNTRANSACTION WHERE GUBUNCODE = 'MA' AND REGSITE = '/transfer/MA3TRNMTI001_70V.view' AND USERID = 'NTBTE568' AND TXCODE = 'D211' AND REGDATE LIKE '20251017%'
